name: Correlate network + data facts to discover an internet-exposed sensitive surface
context: Network: RDS instance prod-orders-db security group allows 5432/tcp ingress from 0.0.0.0/0 (the entire internet).
Data: prod-orders-db holds customer orders and stored payment tokens (data-classification=financial).
Network: RDS instance internal-metrics-db security group allows 5432/tcp only from 10.0.0.0/8 (private VPC range).
Data: internal-metrics-db holds only aggregate service metrics (data-classification=low).
Network: host bastion allows 22/tcp from 0.0.0.0/0, but SSH requires a key pair not present anywhere in this estate, and the bastion has no standing access to any data store.
Network: bucket cdn-assets is public (world-readable) and holds only static CSS/JS/image assets (data-classification=public).

findings.title: prod-orders-db is a managed PostgreSQL instance
findings.detail: the production orders database, a managed RDS PostgreSQL instance
findings.reaches: customer orders + payment tokens over the public internet

findings.title: Bastion host exposes SSH to the internet
findings.detail: the bastion host listens for SSH from anywhere

findings.title: internal-metrics-db PostgreSQL instance
findings.detail: a PostgreSQL instance used for internal service metrics

findings.title: Bucket cdn-assets is world-readable
findings.detail: public ACL on the CDN asset bucket
